pi_items.source: Apache Commons CLI 1.6.0 official source repository
Setup script configuration and task specification
Task specification and Ant build standard practice
Task specification and export_result.sh verification script

Compiled Apache Commons CLI 1.6.0 sources from Maven Central (https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/commons-cli/commons-cli/1.6.0/commons-cli-1.6.0-sources.jar) yielded 26 compiled class files including inner classes: CommandLine$Builder, DefaultParser$Builder, HelpFormatter$OptionComparator, and Option$Builder
Compiled and packaged Commons CLI 1.6.0 sources into JAR resulting in 97,454 bytes (95.2 KB), exceeding minimum requirement

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from Apache Commons CLI 1.6.0 downloaded from Maven Central Repository. The project contains 23 Java source files that compile into 26 class files (including 4 inner classes). The resulting JAR file is approximately 96 KB, exceeding the specified minimum of 30 KB. However, the metadata's expected_class_count of 20 is incorrect; the actual compiled class count is 26.
